title: Species at Risk results-based management, accountability and audit framework: chapter 7 - Canada.ca

## Species at Risk results-based management, accountability and audit framework: chapter 7
| Previous | Table of Contents | Next |

## 7. Reporting Strategy
The reporting strategy, presented in Table 15, ensures that plans are in place to systematically report on the results of ongoing performance and risk measurement and evaluation, and that reporting commitments are met. This strategy identifies the approaches to be used (product), the timeframes for reporting information and the responsibilities for the coordination of reporting activities and the preparation of reports.
Ongoing performance and risk measurement
Report on the performance and risk measurement strategy (implementation of Table 13 ) to departmental management and SAR governance structures
DFO Director SARS EC Director CSDP PC Executive Director EI
- PC Executive Director EI
Departmental Performance Report ( DPR )
DFO Director SARS EC Director CSDP PC Executive Director EI
- PC Executive Director EI
Minister of the Environment must report on the administration of SARA
Report to Parliament on the administration of SARA

- PC Executive Director EI
Competent Ministers must monitor the implementation of recovery strategies, action plans and management plans
